name: Trollhound Vest
description:
This suit of +1 hide armor is sickly green and covered in thick warts and nodules, fashioned from the hide of a trollhound and imbued with some of the beast's vitality. Wearing this armor gives you a –1 circumstance penalty to all checks made using Diplomacy to interact with trolls and a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks used to in communities traditionally plagued by troll attacks.

Activate r Interact

Trigger You take damage from a melee attack while you have half or fewer of your normal maximum Hit Points

Effect Your body knits itself back together, healing you for ] Hit Points.

Craft Requirements The initial raw materials must include the hides of at least two trollhounds.
